title: Computer Vision Path
description: Build fluency in Computer Vision inside AI Applications by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Emotion Recognition
steps.summary: Emotion Recognition belongs to the AI Applications area of AI/ML, within Computer Vision. It sits inside AI Applications / Computer Vision. Compare it with Face Recognition and Fine-grained Visual Recognition. It opens into Emotion Recognition AI and AI in Emotion Recognition.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Face Recognition
steps.summary: Face Recognition belongs to the AI Applications area of AI/ML, within Computer Vision. It sits inside AI Applications / Computer Vision. Compare it with Emotion Recognition and Fine-grained Visual Recognition.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Fine-grained Visual Recognition
steps.summary: Fine-grained Visual Recognition belongs to the AI Applications area of AI/ML, within Computer Vision. It sits inside AI Applications / Computer Vision. Compare it with Face Recognition and Emotion Recognition.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
